examples: Food will last longer if kept in an airtight container.
Store the peppercorns in an airtight container and grind the pepper as you need it.
The casing is nearly airtight, which helps protect the vulnerable egg and later larva.
Under the hood, an airtight enclosure features proprietary neodymium drivers and two opposing passive bass radiators.
Stored at room temperature in an airtight plastic bag, the cake will keep for several days.
